title: Banner Input

icon_prompt.description: Description of the icon to generate via Pollinations/flux. The script automatically appends the background color and color palette. Describe shape and style only.
examples: A single padlock icon, flat modern illustration style, clean minimalistic, no shadows, no text, no other elements, centered square composition
A single bar chart with an upward trend arrow, flat modern illustration style, vibrant multi-color bars, clean minimalistic, no shadows, no text, centered square composition
